heading: Study of national dairy policy

children.text: farm price stability, farm profitability and viability, and local rural economies in the United States;
child, senior, and low-income nutrition programs, including impacts on schools and institutions participating in the programs, on program recipients, and other factors; and
the wholesale and retail cost of fluid milk, dairy farms, and milk utilization.

children.heading: Report
children.label: b Report
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate a report describing the results of the study required by this section.May 13, 2002
Federal milk marketing orders issued under .section 608c of this title
Interstate dairy compacts (including proposed compacts described in H.R. 1827 and S. 1157, as introduced in the 107th Congress).
Over-order premiums and State pricing programs.
Federal milk price support program established under .section 7981 of this title1See References in Text note below.1
Export programs regarding milk and dairy products, such as the dairy export incentive program established under .section 713a–14 of title 151
